external_services.service_name: Application for Educational Benefit Assistance – Financial Assistance for Private Senior High School and College Students
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Educational Benefit Assistance – Financial Assistance for
external_services.who_may_avail: Enrolled senior high school and college students of Lipa City

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Properly filled-out application form – 1 original copy

checklist_of_requirements.source: Respective barangay hall where the applicant resides
Schools, colleges or universities where applicant is enrolled

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Copy of grades from the previous semester – 1 certified true copy
checklist_of_requirements.source: Schools, colleges or universities where applicant is enrolled

steps.client_step: 1. Secure application form, fill it up and submit requirement/s to the person-in-charge for initial assessment
steps.agency_action: 1.1 Accept properly filled-up application form and check the completeness of the submitted requirements before issuing action slip; 1.2. Verify with the barangays, colleges and universities the veracity of the submitted documents
steps.person_responsible: Labor and Employment Officer II, JO-Administrative Aide IV

steps.client_step: 2. Wait for the list to be posted at the City Mayor’s official Facebook page, respective barangay halls, colleges and universities
steps.agency_action: 2.1. Come up with the master list of qualified applicants; 2.2. Inform the students through phone calls, text messages and e-mails; 2.3. Endorse names; 2.4. Prepare and print Certificates
steps.person_responsible: Community Affairs Officer II, City Community Affairs Officer

steps.client_step: 3. Attend orientation/ briefing for students and parents
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Orient the parents and students on the guidelines of the program
steps.person_responsible: City Community Affairs Officer, City Mayor

steps.client_step: 4. Receive financial assistance to qualified beneficiaries
steps.agency_action: 4.1. Distribute financial assistance to qualified beneficiaries
steps.person_responsible: JO-Administrative Aide IV, City Community Affairs Officer, City Mayor
